title: Obtaining NK Cell Clones Using IL-2 and Gene-Modified K562 Cells
author: Maria A Streltsova
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.t6teren

steps.title: Resuspend PBMC with ice-cold separation buffer...
steps.instruction: Resuspend PBMC with ice-cold separation buffer in 15 or 50 ml Falcon™ tube. Determine cell number. All further steps should be done in sterile conditions and as fast as possible. Keeping cells cold and using pre-cooled solutions is needed to prevent capping of antibodies and non-specific labelling. The NK Cell Isolation Kit, human (Miltenyi Biotec) is used for negative magnetic NK cell separation. Separation buffer: Dilute 0.5% BSA (Serva) and 2 mM EDTA (Serva) in PBS. Adjust pH to 7.2. Sterilize by filtering through 22-μm Millipore filter and store up to 2 months at 4°C. NK Cell Isolation Kit, human Miltenyi Biotec Catalog #130-092-657

steps.title: Centrifuge at 200×g for 10 min at 4°C
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 200×g for 10 min at 4°C. Remove the supernatant by decanting or with an automatic pipette.

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet in 40 μl...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet in 40 μl of separation buffer per 10 7 of total cells and transfer the suspension into a new Falcon™ 15 ml polypropylene conical centrifuge tube. This step allows to avoid the intrusion of non-labelled cells from the previous 15/50 ml Falcon™ tube walls into the separation column.

steps.title: Add 10 μl of NK Cell...
steps.instruction: Add 10 μl of NK Cell Biotin-Antibody Cocktail (The NK Cell Isolation Kit, human, by Miltenyi Biotech) per 10 7 of total cells and mix gently. NK Cell Isolation Kit, human Miltenyi Biotec Catalog #130-092-657

steps.title: Incubate for 5 min at 4°C
steps.instruction: Incubate for 5 min at 4°C.

steps.title: Add 30 μl of separation buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 30 μl of separation buffer and 20 μl of NK Cell MicroBead Cocktail (The NK Cell Isolation Kit, human, by Miltenyi Biotech) per 10 7 of total cells. NK Cell Isolation Kit, human Miltenyi Biotec Catalog # 130-092-657

steps.title: Mix gently and incubate for 10 min at 4°C
steps.instruction: Mix gently and incubate for 10 min at 4°C.

steps.title: Adjust the volume of the separation...
steps.instruction: Adjust the volume of the separation buffer up to 500 μl per 10 8 of total cells.

steps.title: Install MACS TM LD column into...
steps.instruction: Install MACS TM LD column into the magnetic field of a MidiMACS Separator and rinse it with 3 ml of separation buffer. It is convenient to begin rinsing the column, when you have put the cells into the ice for 10 min (step 7), as rinsing takes approximately the same time. Other MACS TM columns (MS, LS) can be used for this procedure, but with the LD column, we obtained NK cells with the highest purity. MACS LD column (Column for magnetic separation, Miltenyi Biotech, 130-042-901, https://www.miltenyibiotec.com/AD-en/products/macs-cell-separation/columns/ld-columns.html ) MidiMACS™ Separator (Magnet for magnetic separation, Miltenyi Biotech, 130-042-302, https://www.miltenyibiotec.com/AD-en/products/macs-cell-separation/separators/midimacstm-separator-and-starting-kits.html#130-042-302 )

steps.title: Prepare a new Falcon™ 15 ml...
steps.instruction: Prepare a new Falcon™ 15 ml polypropylene conical centrifuge tube and put it under the column to collect flow-through containing unlabeled NK cells. Apply cell suspension onto the column.

steps.title: Wash the column two times with...
steps.instruction: Wash the column two times with 3 ml of separation buffer. The buffer should be added only when the column reservoir is empty.

steps.title: Take the 15 ml tube from...
steps.instruction: Take the 15 ml tube from under the column, mix well and determine cell number.

steps.title: Centrifuge the tube with NK cells...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the tube with NK cells at 200×g for 10 min at 25°C. Remove the supernatant by decanting or with automatic pipette.

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet in 100 μl...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet in 100 μl of separation buffer per 5×10 6 of total cells and transfer suspension into a new Falcon® 5mL round bottom polypropylene tube, with snap cap. Falcon® 5mL round bottom polypropylene tube, with snap cap, sterile (tube, Corning, 352063, https://www.corning.com/worldwide/en/products/life-sciences/keymatch/352063.html ) If needed, add larger volume of separation buffer and take some cells to prepare controls, e.g., unstained control or single-stain controls, in the additional 5 ml polypropylene centrifuge tubes.

steps.title: Add anti-CD56 and anti-CD3 monoclonal antibodies...
steps.instruction: Add anti-CD56 and anti-CD3 monoclonal antibodies (and any other antibodies needed) according to the manufacturer's instructions into the experimental tube and control tubes. It is possible to expand the panel of antibodies for staining and subsequent sorting of different NK cell subpopulations.

steps.title: Mix gently and incubate for 30 min on ice
steps.instruction: Mix gently and incubate for 30 min on ice.

steps.title: Add 1 ml of staining solution,...
steps.instruction: Add 1 ml of staining solution, centrifuge at 300×g for 4 min at 4°C, and decant the supernatant. Repeat one more time.

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet in 300-500 μl...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet in 300-500 μl of separation buffer per 5×10 6 of total cells.

steps.title: Sort the cells into the 96...
steps.instruction: Sort the cells into the 96 well plates, prepared in advance (see below “Preparation of plates for cell sorting” and "Preparation of feeder cells"), using “single cell” mode on your cell sorter. FACSVantage DiVa (cell sorter, Beckton Dickinson, -)

steps.title: Cultivate the plates with cells in...
steps.instruction: Cultivate the plates with cells in a CO 2 -incubator for 2-3 weeks. It is important not to move the plates during this period. Stirring of the medium can adversely affect the growth of the clones.

steps.title: After 2 weeks of cultivation in...
steps.instruction: After 2 weeks of cultivation in a CO 2 -incubator, a visual assessment of the clone growth is carried out using optical microscope. Cells should be attached to the bottom on the plate and located in the center forming a circular clump. If the accumulation of cells is barely noticeable, the plates should be returned to the CO 2 -incubator for one more week.

steps.title: Irradiate feeder cells with γ radiation (100 Gy)
steps.instruction: Irradiate feeder cells with γ radiation (100 Gy). Cells can be used immediately or frozen in 90% FCS (HyClone) containing 10% DMSO (Sigma) in a refrigerator (-150°C – -135°C) or in liquid nitrogen. Using non-irradiated feeder cells will result in the death of NK cells due to much faster proliferation of K562 cells and subsequent lack of nutrients in the medium. Therefore, if you are not sure about the quality of feeder cell irradiation, you can cultivate 5×10 5 K562-mbIL21 cells in cell culture flask for 3-5 days. The number of irradiated cells should not increase. Fetal calf serum HyClone Catalog #SH3007103 DMSO Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #D1435

steps.title: Cultivate the K562mbIL-21 feeder cells using...
steps.instruction: Cultivate the K562mbIL-21 feeder cells using RPMI-1640 medium in 25cm² cell culture flask at the concentration of 2-6×10 5 cells/ml (to maintain cell growth in log-phase). RPMI-1640 medium supplemented with 10% FBS Contributed by users

steps.title: Add 100 unit/ml of recombinant IL-2...
steps.instruction: Add 100 unit/ml of recombinant IL-2 (Sigma) and 10 4 of irradiated feeder cells per ml into warm AIM-V medium (Gibco). recombinant human IL-2 Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #000000011011456001 AIM V™ Medium, liquid Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #12055091

steps.title: Put 200 μl of the medium...
steps.instruction: Put 200 μl of the medium into central 60 wells of a 96-well plate.

steps.title: Put 200 μl of the RPMI-1640...
steps.instruction: Put 200 μl of the RPMI-1640 medium into 36 marginal wells. Marginal wells are prone to rapid evaporation. This leads to early death of NK cells clones. Therefore, wells with medium only should always surround the wells with cultivated cells. This approach minimizes evaporation from the central wells.

steps.title: During cell sorting, the medium in...
steps.instruction: During cell sorting, the medium in the plates should be warm. For this purpose, the prepared plates can be put in a CO 2 -incubator for a few hours.
